title: Grand Indestructible Kingdom
description: The strongest fortress in the entire world!
body:
GIK adds the cardboard block, a decorative material as well as the most powerful material known to man. Comes in various shapes and styles to suit even the most demanding architectural applications*.

Cardboard types:
- Horizontal Slab
- Vertical Slab
- Trapdoor


A simple toy created for ModFest: Toybox.

<sub>* hama Industries is not responsible for any accidents, deaths or time-outs incurred by misuse of playing with cardboard. T&C apply. Do not swallow, chew, or look too closely at material. Not tested for lead or asbestos. Keep away from children aged below 99999999999999</sub>
